# Recovered session logs (2026-06-15)

One-time recovery after worktree sync overwrote long Handover/Failures narrative.

| File | Contents |
|------|----------|
| `HANDOVER-HISTORY.md` | 2026-06-12–14 milestones, cloud-agent verification notes |
| `FAILURES-HISTORY.md` | Dated failure/fix log through 2026-06-14 |

**Do not edit.** For current state use `docs/Handover.md` and `docs/Failures.md`. For any older version use git:

```bash
git log --oneline -- docs/Failures.md
git show <sha>:docs/Failures.md
```
